name: paperclip-plugin-code-scanner
description: Read-only code and agent-observability detectors for the Steward agent. Wraps gitleaks (secret scan), knip (dead exports), git grep+blame (aged TODOs), README/AGENTS.md drift, and cross-company agent state. Cross-company by default; LLM-agnostic; no mutations.
author: Barry Carr & Tony Allard
